data.title: Equinor Energy extends contract with Havila Shipping ASA for Havila Troll vessel until November 2026.
data.description: Equinor Energy has decided to extend the contract for the vessel Havila Troll for an additional year, securing its services until November 2026.

data.title: Celebrating 70 years of Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region with vibrant scenes of sizzling barbecue and bustling bazaars.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Urumqi, the capital of Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, the air is rich with the smoky scent of barbecue as well as the sweet fragrance of fruit stalls. The bustling atmosphere at the International Grand Bazaar is palpable, with crowds enjoying the vibrant energy of the evening.

data.title: Experts worldwide gather in Uzbekistan to review progress on Center for Islamic Civilization- a landmark for heritage and enlightenment. Over 200 specialists involved.
data.description: This week in Tashkent, Uzbekistan, over 200 international experts are convening to assess advancements in the exploration and conservation of Islamic civilization and heritage. The gathering, which includes specialists from various countries, signifies a crucial moment in the ongoing efforts to understand and protect this cultural legacy.

data.title: Antares Vision Group partners with Guinea-Bissau to boost pharmaceutical traceability and digital health.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Brescia, Italy and Bissau, Guinea-Bissau, a renowned Italian multinational company called Antares Vision, specializing in Track & Trace solutions and quality control systems, announced a groundbreaking initiative to ensure product safety and supply chain transparency. Antares Vision is known for its expertise in integrated data management that enhances the integrity of products.

data.title: Medical Drones Market to grow with 22.19% CAGR from 2025 to 2030, reaching $1.18 billion by 2030, as per Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of September 26, 2025, findings from a report by Mordor Intelligence indicate that the medical drones market is valued at approximately USD 0.43 billion. It is anticipated to exceed USD 1.18 billion by 2030, marking a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.19% between 2025 and 2030. This growth is attributed to increasing demand for...

data.title: 70th anniversary celebration of Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region highlights unity, diversity, and pursuit of better life.
data.description: On September 25th, a large event was held in Beijing to commemorate the 70th anniversary of the establishment of the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region. The celebration marked a significant milestone for the region, with various festivities and activities organized to honor the occasion. The establishment of the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region occurred 70 years ago, signifying a momentous event in the region's history. The anniversary was commemorated with a grand gathering, highlighting the importance of this milestone.

data.title: Aker Carbon Capture ASA has been liquidated following a resolution on Aug 5, 2025. Liquidation dividends to be paid.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Fornebu, Norway, it was noted that an extraordinary general meeting was held for Aker Carbon Capture ASA, where it was decided to liquidate the company. This decision was made during the meeting on August 5, 2025. The company's Board of Directors has taken steps towards the liquidation process.

data.title: IOTA launches Trust Framework for businesses, providing tools for identity and notarization. Aim: simplify blockchain integration.
data.description: IOTA has launched the Trust Framework, a suite of open-source tools aimed at simplifying blockchain technology for businesses. The framework includes features for identity verification, notarization, and other functions. This initiative by IOTA is set to enhance the adoption of blockchain technology in the business realm.

data.title: World Liberty Financial, backed by Trump, to initiate token buybacks post 41% price decline, aiming to stabilize value.
data.description: World Liberty Financial has announced plans to initiate a buyback and burn program for its WLFI token, following a notable 41% decrease in price during September. The purpose of this initiative is to decrease the token supply in order to stabilize its value in the market.
